description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the maven:3.2.5-jdk-8 Docker image, with stages build and deploy. Add a build_job in the build stage that runs mvn clean install verify -B -Dgpg.skip=true then displays the JaCoCo coverage report by catting /builds/allima/my-similarity-project/target/site/jacoco/index.html. No services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined, and the deploy stage is left empty for future jobs.
